title: To Kill a Mockingbird Theme Essay
gradingNotes:
Students should identify a major theme (courage, justice, prejudice, innocence) and support with at least 3 text examples.
Look for direct quotes from the novel.
Thesis should clearly state the theme and argument.
Conclusion should connect theme to modern relevance.
Do NOT penalize for minor grammar issues if the ideas are strong.

importedDoc.text:
To Kill a Mockingbird Theme Essay

[GRAIDER:QUESTION:1]
1) State your thesis (20 pts)

[GRAIDER:QUESTION:2]
2) Provide evidence (45 pts)

[GRAIDER:QUESTION:3]
3) Write a conclusion (20 pts)
